mano_cua.result_summary: 状态栏正常显示：左侧显示光标位置（Ln 1 Col 2）和最后保存时间，右侧显示笔记名称（Scratch）和语言模式（Plain Text [auto]）。在当前系统区域设置下（中文），状态栏未消失，功能正常。该 bug 需要特定 Unicode 区域扩展环境才能触发。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Status bar IS present and visible. Shows: cursor position (Ln 1 Col 2), last saved time (21:22), note name (Scratch), language mode (Plain Text [auto]). Status bar has not disappeared despite Chinese system locale settings.
